title: India Remains a Rare Bright Spot
section_path: India Remains a Rare Bright Spot
section_path_text: India Remains a Rare Bright Spot
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Global crude steel production outside of China totaled 71.5 million tons in May. This is up month-on-month by 2.7 million tons (4%) but is 1.4 million tons (-2%) less than was reported last year for May 2022's production. Crude steel production outside of China has now contracted on a year-on-year basis for fifteen straight months.
